problem.title: GICP throughput and accuracy trade-off on the second public HDL-400 reference window
problem.question: Which GICP dogfooding profile should stay as the current default on a deeper HDL-400 public reference set while keeping faster and denser alternatives comparable?

dataset.reference_role: public reference trajectory sliced from the HDL-400 pose trace export

variants.label: Balanced local map
variants.intent: Keep the current repository default as the baseline trade-off.

variants.label: Fast recent map
variants.intent: Reduce scan density and map pressure to increase FPS.

variants.label: Dense recent map
variants.intent: Increase scan density, map budget, and correspondence richness.
